titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5947

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=796 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.912263+00 | translation moa=797 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.923071+00

div.p:
Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos presens scriptum peruenerit  Robertus filius Reginaldi de Magna Ristona Salutem . Nouerit vniuersitas
uestra me dedisse . concessisse . et hac presenti carta mea confirmasse deo et sancto Chudhberto et sancte Ebbe et monachis Dunelmen
sibus apud Coldingham deo seruientibus . et in perpetuum ibidem seruituris in puram et perpetuam Elemosinam pro salute anime mee
et antecessorum et successorum meorum triginta acras et dimidiam in territorio ville Magne Ristone . Scilicet In tofto et crofto vnam acram
et dimidiam ex orientali parte tofti mei . In Held’ quinque acras . et tres rodas . Inter nemora unam acram et dimidiam . In Gorbald acram
vnam . In Coleleche et Bilie haluch unam acram . In Hopeland et Smethemedwe unam acram . In Brere unam acram .
In Wyterleche duas acras . Subtus Bilielawe unam rodam . In superiori parte de Laytolf quatuor acras . Ex occidentali parte
e Wythenehep vndecim acras et dimidiam . Cum communi pastura et communibus aysiamentis dicte uille de Ristona . Quare
volo quod dicti prior et monachi dunelmenses dictas terras habeant et teneant in perpetuum Ita Libere . quiete . plenarie et hono
rifice sicut aliqua Elemosina in regno Scotie . Liberius . quiecius . plenarius . et honorificencius . tenetur . uel possidetur .
Ego autem et heredes mei warantizabimus dictis priori et monachis dictas terras In perpetuum contra omnes homines . Et in huius rei testi
monium  huic scripto sigillum meum apposui . Hiis Testibus Domino Willelmo de Morthintona . Domino Alano de Swintona . Domino Ada de
Prendergest . Waltero . Andrea . Alexandro . de Paxtona . Willelmo vicario de Aldekambus . Roberto filio Gregorii . Adam de Parua Ristona .
Bertramo filio eius . Iohanne filio Elye de Superiori Aytona . Mauricio filio Merlini . Radulfo preposito de Coldingham . et multis aliis .

p.cl: To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Robert son of Reginald of Great Reston sends greeting.

to have given, granted, and made firm by this my present charter, to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Æbbe, and the monks of Durham serving God at Coldingham now and for ever in the future, in pure and perpetual alms, for the salvation fo my own soul, and [the souls] of my ancestors and successors, thirty acres and a half in the territory of the toun of Great Reston; that is, one-and-a-half acres in the toft and croft on the eastn side of my toft; five acres and three roods in Held' ; one-and-a-half acres between the woods; one acre in Gorbald; one acre in Coleleche and Bilie haluch; one acre in Hopeland and Smethemedwe; one acre in Brere; two acres in Wyterleche; one rood below Bilielawe; four acres on the upper side of Laytolf; eleven-and-a-half acres on the western side of Wythenehep; with the common pasture and common easements of the said toun of Reston. Wherefore I will that the said prior and monks of Durham should have and hold the said lands for ever, as freely, quitely, fully and honourably as any alms in the kingdom of Scotland is freely, quitely, fully, and honourably held or possessed. And I and my heirs shall warrant to the said prior and monks the said lands in perpetuity against all men.
And in testimony of this matter, I have applied my seal to this writing.
